# WebWaka OS — Verticals Execution Prompts: Education + Agricultural Extended

**Document type:** Agent execution prompt set
**Scope:** Education (4) + Agricultural (9) extended verticals — 13 verticals covered
**Repo:** https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os
**Branch base:** `main`
**Milestone targets:** M9–M12
**Status:** Ready for agent execution — P1 Education and Agricultural verticals complete (M8e)
**Generated by:** MASTER_CONTINUATION_PROMPT.md — Set G

---

> **3-in-1 Platform Note:**
> Education verticals serve **Pillar 1 (Ops)**, **Pillar 2 (Branding)**, and **Pillar 3 (Marketplace)** depending on the sub-vertical.
> Agricultural verticals primarily serve **Pillar 1 (Ops)** and **Pillar 3 (Marketplace)** for commodity discovery.
> **SuperAgent AI is cross-cutting — NOT a fourth pillar.**
> **AI autonomy caps:**
> - Agricultural advisory AI: **L2 maximum** (ADL-010 — agricultural decisions have livelihood impact; human review before acting on AI yield forecasts)
> - Education student progress AI: **L2 maximum** (aggregate class statistics only — no individual student data to AI; P13 strictly enforced)
> - USSD excluded (P12); NDPR consent required (P10)
> See `docs/governance/3in1-platform-architecture.md` for the full pillar map.

### General rules for all agents using these prompts

- Never make assumptions about WebWaka's architecture. Always read the referenced documents and code first.
- Agricultural monetary values: commodity prices in kobo per kg (integer kobo per integer gram/kg). No float pricing ever.
- Education fees in kobo (P9). Student identifiers are opaque ref IDs — never student names in AI prompts (P13).
- No cross-tenant data leakage (T3). All D1 queries scoped to `tenant_id`.
- Agricultural AI: L2 autonomy cap — yield forecasts and commodity price alerts are advisory only; never auto-execute procurement or sales.

---

## EDUCATION VERTICALS

---

## TASK V-EDU-EXT-1: Driving School (FRSC-Licensed) Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `driving-school`
- **Priority:** P2-Top100 — Hundreds of FRSC-registered driving schools across Nigerian states; mandatory for VIO drivers licence issuance; growing demand from urban middle class
- **Milestone target:** M9
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 2 (Branding) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:**
  - Verticals master plan: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/verticals-master-plan.md
  - 3-in-1 platform architecture: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/3in1-platform-architecture.md
  - Verticals FSM engine: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/packages/verticals/src/
  - Platform invariants: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/platform-invariants.md
  - Entitlement model: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/entitlement-model.md
  - AI integration framework: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/ai-integration-framework.md
  - SuperAgent product spec: https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/docs/governance/superagent/02-product-spec.md
  - School vertical (M8e reference): https://github.com/WebWakaDOS/webwaka-os/blob/main/packages/verticals-school/

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in driving school management software, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:**
- Nigerian driving school sector — FRSC (Federal Road Safety Corps) approved driving school registration, VIO (Vehicle Inspection Officers) test referral process, driving test booking through DRTS (Driver Rehabilitation Testing System), vehicle instructors' licences
- Student enrolment, lesson scheduling (theory + practical), vehicle assignment, test booking reference, certificate tracking
- Cloudflare Workers + Hono + D1 TypeScript strict mode; WebWaka SuperAgent integration; Verticals FSM engine
- P13: student names in internal records but never in AI prompts — use opaque student_ref_id

---

**1. Mandatory context reading (100% before execution):**

- `docs/governance/verticals-master-plan.md` — Education verticals; entry for `driving-school`
- `docs/governance/3in1-platform-architecture.md`
- `docs/governance/platform-invariants.md` — P2, P9, P10, P12, P13, T3, T4
- `infra/db/seeds/0004_verticals-master.csv` — row for `driving-school`
- `packages/verticals/src/` — FSM engine; `packages/auth/src/guards.ts`
- `docs/governance/ai-integration-framework.md`; `infra/db/migrations/` — next migration number
- `packages/verticals-school/src/` — reference M8e school implementation

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Research tasks:
- Nigerian driving school market — FRSC-registered schools by state, average driving course cost (₦15,000–₦80,000), theory + practical breakdown, student failure/pass rates at FRSC test
- Competitors: FRSC-approved driving schools (government-linked), private schools (Lagos Driving School, Pass First Time Driving School); no dedicated driving school SaaS in Nigeria
- Key features: student enrolment (student_ref_id, course_type: car/truck/motorcycle, enrolment_fee_kobo), lesson schedule (instructor, vehicle, lesson_date, lesson_type: theory/practical, attendance), FRSC test booking reference, certificate issuance log, instructor management, vehicle maintenance log

Execution plan:
- **Objective:** Give Nigerian driving schools digital student management, lesson scheduling, FRSC test booking reference, and instructor-vehicle assignment
- **Schema:**
  - `driving_school_profiles` — school_name, FRSC_registration, state, CAC_RC, workspace_id, tenant_id, status
  - `ds_students` — student_ref_id TEXT, course_type (car/truck/motorcycle), enrolment_fee_kobo, lessons_paid INTEGER, start_date INTEGER, frsc_test_date INTEGER, test_status (pending/booked/passed/failed), cert_issued BOOLEAN, tenant_id
  - `ds_lessons` — student_ref_id, instructor_id, vehicle_id, lesson_date INTEGER, lesson_type (theory/practical), attended BOOLEAN, tenant_id
  - `ds_vehicles` — vehicle_plate, type (car/truck/motorcycle), purchase_cost_kobo, last_service_date INTEGER, status (active/maintenance), tenant_id
- **FSM states:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `frsc_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `STUDENT_PROGRESS_REPORT` (aggregate pass rate, lesson completion rate) — L2; Growth plan; student_ref_id only — no names, test result details (P13)
- **Regulatory hook:** FRSC registration number at `frsc_verified`; instructor's VIO licence stored per instructor
- **KYC:** Tier 1 for enrolment fees; Tier 2 for fleet financing above ₦5M

---

**3. Implementation workflow:**

Branch: `feat/vertical-driving-school` from `main`. Schema: `[NEXT_NUMBER]_vertical_driving_school.sql`. Monetary in kobo (P9). Student ref as opaque UUID. Tenant scoped (T3). Package: `registerDrivingSchoolVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. AI: aggregate pass rates and lesson counts by course type — no student_ref_id (P13). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:**

**Test file:** `packages/verticals-driving-school/src/driving-school.test.ts`

Positive: register; FSM to `frsc_verified`; student enrolled with integer enrolment_fee_kobo; lesson scheduled; vehicle added with integer purchase_cost_kobo; FRSC test date set; certificate issued flag; AI progress report with aiRights + NDPR (aggregate only). Negative: student name in AI payload → P13 blocked; fractional kobo; cross-tenant → 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM → typed error. Security: unauth → 401; KYC → 403.

**Minimum test count: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Finalize and push:**

```bash
git commit -m "feat(vertical/driving-school): Driving School vertical — student management, lessons, FRSC compliance (M9)"
git push origin feat/vertical-driving-school
```
PR checklist: FSM (FRSC verified gate), migration, `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`, labeled, P13 student name exclusion tested, SuperAgent L2, T3, ≥15 tests, zero errors.

## TASK V-EDU-EXT-2: Training Institute / Vocational School Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `training-institute`
- **Priority:** P2-Top100 — Nigeria has thousands of vocational and technical training institutes; NBTE-accredited polytechnics, NABTEB-affiliated trade schools, ITF (Industrial Training Fund) SIWES partners
- **Milestone target:** M9
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 2 (Branding) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in vocational training management software, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:**
- Nigerian vocational training sector — NBTE (National Board for Technical Education), NABTEB (National Business and Technical Examinations Board), ITF (Industrial Training Fund) SIWES programme, NITI (Nigeria Institute of Training and Instructors); government and private institute management
- Course catalogue, student enrolment, exam registration, certificate tracking, ITF-SIWES industrial attachment placement, trainer management
- Cloudflare Workers + Hono + D1 TypeScript strict mode; WebWaka SuperAgent integration; Verticals FSM engine
- P13: student names opaque in AI; student progress data aggregate only

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Research tasks: Nigerian vocational training market — NBTE accredited institutions count, ITF annual training throughput, SIWES student placement volume; average course fees (₦20,000–₦200,000); competitor tools: no dominant Nigerian vocational SaaS; key features: course catalogue (course_name, duration_weeks INTEGER, course_fee_kobo, NBTE_approval_number), student enrolment (student_ref_id, course_id, enrolment_fee_kobo, exam_registration_fee_kobo, NABTEB_reg_number), trainer profiles (trainer_name, qualification, assigned_courses), ITF-SIWES placement log, certificate issuance log.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `training_institute_profiles` (institute_name, NBTE_accreditation, ITF_registration, NABTEB_centre_number, CAC_RC, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `ti_courses` (course_name, trade_area, duration_weeks INTEGER, course_fee_kobo, nbte_approval_number, tenant_id); `ti_students` (student_ref_id TEXT, course_id, enrolment_date INTEGER, enrolment_fee_kobo, exam_fee_kobo, nabteb_reg_number, siwes_placement BOOLEAN, cert_issued BOOLEAN, tenant_id); `ti_trainers` (trainer_name, qualification, assigned_courses JSON, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `nbte_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `STUDENT_PROGRESS_REPORT` (enrolment-to-certification rate by trade), `DEMAND_PLANNING` (course demand forecast) — L2; Growth plan; aggregate course stats only (P13)
- **KYC:** Tier 1 for enrolment fees; Tier 2 for SIWES placement operations

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-training-institute`. `registerTrainingInstituteVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. Kobo (P9). Student ref opaque. Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `nbte_verified`; course with integer course_fee_kobo; student enrolment with integer enrolment_fee_kobo; SIWES placement flag; certificate issued; AI progress report with aiRights + NDPR (aggregate only); student name in AI → P13 blocked; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401; KYC 403. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:** `git commit -m "feat(vertical/training-institute): Training Institute vertical — courses, enrolments, NBTE/NABTEB compliance (M9)"`. PR checklist standard including P13 test.

## TASK V-EDU-EXT-3: Crèche / Day Care Centre Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `creche`
- **Priority:** P3-Specialist — Growing urban childcare demand; working parents in Lagos, Abuja; SUBEB and state social welfare oversight; child safety data is extremely sensitive (P13 + L3 HITL)
- **Milestone target:** M12
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 2 (Branding) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","branding","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in childcare management software, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian childcare sector — SUBEB (State Universal Basic Education Boards), state social welfare oversight, CAC registration, FMHSW (child welfare); child safety data is the most sensitive data type — P13 + L3 HITL mandatory; daily attendance, parent communication, meal logs, development milestone references (opaque refs — no clinical detail to AI).

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents. P13 read section three times for child data.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Key features: child register (child_ref_id opaque), daily attendance, meal log (meal_type, date), parent/guardian contact (encrypted external), monthly fee (monthly_fee_kobo), activity schedule, staff rota, SUBEB registration tracking.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `creche_profiles` (creche_name, SUBEB_registration, state_social_welfare_cert, CAC_RC, capacity INTEGER, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `creche_children` (child_ref_id TEXT, age_months INTEGER, admission_date INTEGER, monthly_fee_kobo, status (active/withdrawn), tenant_id); `creche_attendance` (child_ref_id, attendance_date INTEGER, present BOOLEAN, tenant_id); `creche_billing` (child_ref_id, billing_period TEXT, fee_kobo, paid_kobo, outstanding_kobo, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `subeb_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `PATIENT_FLOW_REPORT` adapted as `ATTENDANCE_REPORT` (aggregate attendance rate, occupancy) — **L3 HITL mandatory for all AI** (child data); NDPR consent; USSD excluded (P12)
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for monthly billing; no child PII ever to AI (P13)

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-creche`. `registerCrecheVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. Child_ref_id opaque UUID. No names, ages, developmental notes to AI. L3 HITL on all AI. Kobo (P9). Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `subeb_verified`; child registered with integer age_months, monthly_fee_kobo; attendance recorded; billing with integer fee_kobo; AI attendance report with HITL + aiRights + NDPR (aggregate only); child PII in AI → P13 blocked; missing HITL → blocked; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401; KYC 403. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:** `git commit -m "feat(vertical/creche): Creche vertical — child attendance, billing, SUBEB compliance, L3 HITL AI (M12)"`. PR checklist: L3 HITL mandatory, P13 child data, SUBEB gate, standard checks.

- **SuperAgent:** `STUDENT_PROGRESS_REPORT` (aggregate class pass rates, fee collection efficiency) — L2; Growth plan; student_ref_id only — no individual grades to AI (P13)
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for term fee collection; Tier 3 for payroll above ₦10M/term

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-private-school`. `registerPrivateSchoolVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","branding","marketplace"]`. Student ref opaque. No individual grades to AI. Kobo (P9). Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `subeb_verified`; student with integer term_fee_kobo; fee payment logged; teacher with integer monthly_salary_kobo; AI progress report with aiRights + NDPR (aggregate only); individual student grade in AI → P13 blocked; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401; KYC 403. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

## AGRICULTURAL VERTICALS

## TASK V-AGR-EXT-1: Agro-Input Dealer Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `agro-input`
- **Priority:** P2-Top100 — Agro-input dealers (seeds, fertilizer, agrochemicals) are critical to Nigeria's agricultural supply chain; FMARD, NAFDAC, NASC regulation; Anchor Borrowers Programme integration readiness
- **Milestone target:** M10
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in agricultural input distribution management, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:**
- Nigerian agro-input market — NASC (National Agricultural Seeds Council) seed certification, FEPSAN (Fertilizer Producers and Suppliers Association of Nigeria) membership, NAFDAC agrochemical registration, FMARD Anchor Borrowers Programme (ABP) subsidy tracking
- Product catalogue (seeds, fertilizers, herbicides, pesticides) in kobo per kg or per bag; farmer credit account management; seasonal demand forecasting
- Cloudflare Workers + Hono + D1 TypeScript strict mode; WebWaka SuperAgent integration; Verticals FSM engine
- Agricultural AI cap: L2 maximum (ADL-010)

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents + `docs/governance/ai-architecture-decision-log.md` (ADL-010 agricultural AI cap).

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Research tasks: Nigerian agro-input market — NAFDAC registered agrochemicals count, fertilizer subsidy distribution (E-wallet scheme), seed certification by NASC, average maize/rice seed cost per kg; key features: product catalogue (seed_variety, NASC_certification, unit (kg/bag), price_per_unit_kobo, quantity_in_stock), farmer credit account, ABP subsidy tracking (abp_tranche_kobo, disbursed_to_farmers INTEGER), seasonal order log, agrochemical batch tracking (NAFDAC registration number per product).

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `agro_input_profiles` (company_name, NASC_dealer_number, FEPSAN_membership, NAFDAC_agrochemical_reg, FMARD_abp_participant, CAC_RC, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `agro_input_catalogue` (product_name, category (seed/fertilizer/herbicide/pesticide/equipment), NASC_or_NAFDAC_cert_number, unit, price_per_unit_kobo, quantity_in_stock, tenant_id); `agro_input_orders` (farmer_phone, farmer_name, items JSON, total_kobo, abp_subsidy_kobo, balance_kobo, status, tenant_id); `agro_input_farmer_credit` (farmer_phone, credit_limit_kobo, balance_owing_kobo, abp_wallet_balance_kobo, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `nasc_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `COMMODITY_PRICE_ALERT` (seasonal seed/fertilizer demand), `YIELD_FORECAST` (crop input correlation — L2 maximum, advisory only); NDPR consent; USSD excluded (P12)
- **Regulatory hook:** NASC dealer number + NAFDAC agrochemical reg at `nasc_verified`; ABP participation flag stored
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for farmer credit; Tier 3 for ABP subsidy disbursement operations

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-agro-input`. `registerAgroInputVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","marketplace"]`. All monetary in kobo (P9). AI at L2 cap — no automated purchasing decisions. No farmer PII in AI beyond anonymised aggregate counts (P13). Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `nasc_verified`; catalogue item with integer price_per_unit_kobo; order with integer total_kobo, abp_subsidy_kobo; farmer credit with integer credit_limit_kobo; AI price alert with aiRights + NDPR (L2 only); automated purchase action blocked (L2 cap test); fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401; KYC 403. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:** `git commit -m "feat(vertical/agro-input): Agro-Input Dealer vertical — catalogue, farmer credit, ABP, AI demand (M10)"`. PR checklist: L2 cap tested, NASC gate, standard checks.

## TASK V-AGR-EXT-2: Cold Room / Storage Facility Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `cold-room`
- **Priority:** P2-Top100 — Cold chain infrastructure is critical for Nigeria's agricultural sector; tomato, yam, fish, poultry post-harvest losses are enormous; NAFDAC cold chain compliance
- **Milestone target:** M10
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in cold chain and agricultural storage management, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian cold chain sector — NAFDAC cold chain compliance, SON cold storage standards, FMARD AgriSME cold room grant programme, post-harvest loss reduction; temperature monitoring (stored as integer millidegrees Celsius to avoid floats), storage unit billing in kobo, client commodity register.

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents + ADL-010 agricultural AI cap.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Research tasks: Nigeria cold chain market — NAFDAC cold room requirements, post-harvest loss statistics (40–50% for tomatoes), average storage cost per MT per day; key features: cold room unit register (unit_number, capacity_tonnes INTEGER × 1000 for kg, current_temperature_m°C INTEGER, status), client storage agreement (client_phone, commodity_type, quantity_kg INTEGER, daily_rate_kobo, entry_date, status), temperature log (timestamp INTEGER, temperature_m°C INTEGER, alert_flag), NAFDAC compliance inspection record.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `cold_room_profiles` (facility_name, NAFDAC_cold_chain_cert, SON_cert, capacity_kg INTEGER, CAC_RC, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `cold_room_units` (unit_number, capacity_kg INTEGER, current_temp_mc INTEGER, status (active/maintenance/fault), tenant_id); `cold_storage_agreements` (client_phone, commodity_type, quantity_kg INTEGER, daily_rate_kobo, entry_date INTEGER, exit_date INTEGER, total_charged_kobo, status (active/withdrawn), tenant_id); `cold_temp_log` (unit_id, log_time INTEGER, temperature_mc INTEGER, alert_flag BOOLEAN, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `nafdac_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `COLD_CHAIN_ANOMALY` (temperature deviation alert analysis) — L2; Growth plan; aggregate temp stats only — no client commodity details (P13); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **Agricultural AI cap:** L2 — temperature anomaly alerts are informational; no automated intervention
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for storage billing; Tier 3 for bulk commodity collateral above ₦50M

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-cold-room`. `registerColdRoomVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","marketplace"]`. Temperature in integer millidegrees Celsius (no floats). Capacity in integer kg. Kobo (P9). Tenant scoped (T3). L2 cap on AI. USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `nafdac_verified`; unit with integer capacity_kg; temperature log with integer temperature_mc; agreement with integer quantity_kg, daily_rate_kobo; AI anomaly report with aiRights + NDPR (aggregate temp stats); float temperature rejected; float capacity rejected; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; automated action from AI → L2 cap blocked; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401; KYC 403. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:** `git commit -m "feat(vertical/cold-room): Cold Room vertical — temperature monitoring, storage billing, NAFDAC compliance (M10)"`. PR checklist: float rejection tests, L2 cap, NAFDAC gate, standard checks.

## TASK V-AGR-EXT-3: Abattoir / Meat Processing Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `abattoir`
- **Priority:** P3-Specialist — Abattoirs are critical food safety nodes in Nigeria; NAFDAC, NVRI (National Veterinary Research Institute), state animal health regulation; over 1,000 registered abattoirs nationwide
- **Milestone target:** M12
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in abattoir and food safety management, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian abattoir sector — NAFDAC food safety, NVRI veterinary inspection, state animal health authority; livestock slaughter log (head count as integers), meat sales in kobo per kg, veterinary inspection certificate tracking, waste disposal compliance.

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents + ADL-010 agricultural AI cap.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Key features: slaughter log (animal_type (cattle/sheep/goat/pig/poultry), head_count INTEGER, slaughter_date, vet_inspection_flag, meat_yield_kg INTEGER), buyer log (buyer_phone, quantity_kg INTEGER, price_per_kg_kobo, total_kobo), NAFDAC food safety compliance record, waste disposal log.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `abattoir_profiles` (abattoir_name, NAFDAC_registration, NVRI_approval, state_animal_health_cert, CAC_RC, capacity_head_per_day INTEGER, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `abattoir_slaughter_log` (slaughter_date INTEGER, animal_type, head_count INTEGER, vet_inspected BOOLEAN, meat_yield_kg INTEGER, tenant_id); `abattoir_sales` (buyer_phone, animal_type, quantity_kg INTEGER, price_per_kg_kobo, total_kobo, sale_date INTEGER, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `nafdac_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `YIELD_FORECAST` (slaughter volume trend by animal type) — L2; Growth plan; aggregate head counts and yield stats — no buyer details (P13); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **KYC:** Tier 2 for meat sales billing; Tier 3 for bulk meat export operations

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-abattoir`. `registerAbattoirVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","marketplace"]`. All weights as integer kg. Head counts as integers. Kobo (P9). Tenant scoped (T3). L2 cap. USSD excluded (P12).

---

QA:** Register; FSM to `nafdac_verified`; slaughter log with integer head_count, meat_yield_kg; sale with integer quantity_kg, price_per_kg_kobo, total_kobo; AI yield forecast with aiRights + NDPR; float kg rejected; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. Unauth 401; KYC 403. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

## TASK V-AGR-EXT-5: Cocoa / Export Commodities Trader Vertical

- **Module / vertical:** `packages/verticals` + vertical slug `cocoa-exporter`
- **Priority:** P3-Specialist — Nigeria is Africa's fourth-largest cocoa producer; export commodity traders in Lagos, Ibadan, Ondo; CBN FX repatriation requirements, CRIN (Cocoa Research Institute), NXP (export licence)
- **Milestone target:** M12
- **Primary pillars:** Pillar 1 (Ops) + Pillar 3 (Marketplace)
- **`primary_pillars` value:** `["ops","marketplace"]`
- **GitHub context:** (standard links)

---

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in agricultural commodity export management, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian cocoa export sector — CRIN quality grading, NXP (Nigeria Export Promotion Council) export licence, CBN FX repatriation (proceeds must be repatriated within 60 days), NEPC (Nigerian Export Promotion Council), Nigerian Customs export documentation; commodity weight in integer kg, export value in kobo + USD equivalent tracked separately.

---

**1. Mandatory context reading:** All standard documents + ADL-010 agricultural AI cap.

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Key features: cocoa procurement (farmer_phone, quantity_kg INTEGER, grade (grade1/grade2/grade3), price_per_kg_kobo, intake_date), export shipment (buyer country, quantity_kg INTEGER, CRIN_quality_cert, NEPC_licence_number, CBN_FX_form_number, fob_value_kobo, shipping_date), FX repatriation tracking.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `cocoa_exporter_profiles` (company_name, NEPC_exporter_licence, NXP_number, CRIN_registered, CBN_forex_dealer, CAC_RC, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `cocoa_procurement` (farmer_phone, quantity_kg INTEGER, grade, price_per_kg_kobo, intake_date INTEGER, tenant_id); `cocoa_exports` (buyer_country, quantity_kg INTEGER, quality_cert_ref, nepc_licence_ref, cbn_fx_form, fob_value_kobo, shipping_date INTEGER, fx_repatriated_kobo, repatriation_date INTEGER, status (prepared/shipped/repatriated), tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `nepc_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `COMMODITY_PRICE_ALERT` (global cocoa price advisory — L2, informational only); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12). Farmer phone never in AI (P13).
- **KYC:** Tier 3 mandatory — export FX transactions; CBN forex dealer requirements

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-cocoa-exporter`. `registerCocoaExporterVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","marketplace"]`. Weights as integers. Kobo (P9). Tier 3 KYC required. Farmer details excluded from AI (P13). L2 cap. Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

---

**4. QA:** Register; FSM to `nepc_verified`; procurement with integer quantity_kg, price_per_kg_kobo; export with integer fob_value_kobo, fx_repatriated_kobo; AI commodity alert with aiRights + NDPR; auto-sell blocked (L2); farmer phone in AI → P13 blocked; float kg rejected; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error; Tier 3 KYC enforced. **Minimum: 15 tests.**

---

**5. Push:** `git commit -m "feat(vertical/cocoa-exporter): Cocoa Exporter vertical — procurement, export, CBN FX, AI commodity alert (M12)"`. PR checklist: Tier 3, L2 cap, P13 farmer exclusion, NEPC gate, standard checks.

You are an expert **Senior Full-Stack Engineer** specialising in fish trade and perishable goods management, working on WebWaka OS.

**Skills required:** Nigerian fish market sector — NIFDA, NAFDAC food safety, FMARD fisheries division; fresh vs frozen fish management; perishable stock with expiry tracking (unix expiry date as integer); weight in integer grams; price per kg in kobo.

---

---

**2. Online research and execution plan:**

Key features: stock intake (fish_type, weight_grams INTEGER, source (fresh/frozen/smoked), cost_per_kg_kobo, intake_date, expiry_date INTEGER), sales (buyer_phone, fish_type, weight_grams INTEGER, price_per_kg_kobo, total_kobo, sale_date), daily stock wastage log, supplier log.

Execution plan:
- **Schema:** `fish_market_profiles` (business_name, NAFDAC_food_safety_cert, NIFDA_registration, market_location, workspace_id, tenant_id, status); `fish_stock` (fish_type, category (fresh/frozen/smoked/dried), weight_grams INTEGER, cost_per_kg_kobo, expiry_date INTEGER, source, tenant_id); `fish_sales` (buyer_phone, fish_type, weight_grams INTEGER, price_per_kg_kobo, total_kobo, sale_date INTEGER, tenant_id); `fish_wastage` (waste_date INTEGER, fish_type, weight_grams INTEGER, reason, tenant_id)
- **FSM:** `seeded` → `claimed` → `nafdac_verified` → `active` → `suspended`
- **SuperAgent:** `DEMAND_PLANNING` (fish type demand by day of week), `COMMODITY_PRICE_ALERT` — L2; Growth plan; aggregate weight and revenue stats by fish type (P13); NDPR; USSD excluded (P12)
- **KYC:** Tier 1 for retail; Tier 2 for bulk wholesale above ₦200,000/day

---

**3. Implementation:** Branch `feat/vertical-fish-market`. `registerFishMarketVertical()` with `primary_pillars: ["ops","marketplace"]`. Weight in integer grams. Kobo (P9). Expiry as integer unix timestamp. L2 cap. Tenant scoped (T3). USSD excluded (P12).

QA:** Register; FSM to `nafdac_verified`; stock with integer weight_grams, cost_per_kg_kobo, expiry_date; sale with integer total_kobo; expiry alert fires when expiry_date < now; AI demand with aiRights + NDPR; float weight rejected; fractional kobo rejected; cross-tenant 403; AI triply blocked; invalid FSM typed error. **5. Finalize and push:**


PR checklist:
- [ ] Vertical registered in FSM (3-state informal pattern)
- [ ] Migration: all weight columns as INTEGER grams — no float columns
- [ ] `primary_pillars: ["ops","marketplace"]`
- [ ] PR labeled: `3in1:pillar-1`, `3in1:pillar-3`
- [ ] L2 agricultural AI cap enforced and tested
- [ ] Automated purchase/sell action triggered by AI → blocked (L2 cap test)
- [ ] USSD exclusion enforced (P12)
- [ ] T3 on all D1 queries
- [ ] Tests ≥ 15, all passing
- [ ] Zero typecheck errors (`pnpm -r typecheck`)
- [ ] Zero lint errors (`pnpm -r lint`)
